title: LinkedIn CPL holds flat at $138 while industry climbs 12%

connect: March CPL ran at $156; Q1 average was $174.
body: April audience refresh applied to 4 campaigns covering 62% of paid budget on April 1. March CPL ran at $156; Q1 average was $174.
